llm_recommendations.reason_for_recommendation: Reported strong Q1 FY27 consolidated net profit rise (₹304.84 crore vs ₹220.48 crore YoY) and approved strategic corporate actions (incorporation of subsidiary/SPV, increased stake in a joint venture). Shares zoomed 9% on NSE.
Laggard in Indian stock markets due to surging crude oil prices and escalating West Asia tensions, contributing to overall market decline (Sensex down 230.95 points).
